name: echocial
description: Backend of Echocial. A mobile-first app for online reputation
author: Ahmed Derbala <ahmed.derbala@esprit.tn>

scripts.start:prod-pm2: npm run i && NODE_ENV=production pm2 start src/main.js -i max --node-args='--max-old-space-size=32000' -f
scripts.start:prod-pm2-monit: npm run i && NODE_ENV=production pm2 start src/main.js -i max --node-args='--max-old-space-size=32000' -f && pm2 monit
scripts.restart: pm2 delete all && npm run start
scripts.start:pullmain: git pull origin main && npm run i && npm run start:code
scripts.start:pm2: pm2 start src/main.js -i max --node-args='--max-old-space-size=32000' -f && pm2 monit
scripts.start:first-time: cp src/configs/config.sample.js src/configs/config.js && npm run i && npm run start:local
scripts.clean:ai: npm run clean:a && npm run i
scripts.clean:air: npm run clean:ai && npm run start:default
scripts.update:a: rm -r -f .backups/* && cp package.json .backups/package.json.backup && cp package-lock.json .backups/package-lock.json.backup 2>/dev/null; true && mv node_modules .backups/node_modules.backup 2>/dev/null; true && npm i -D npm-check-updates --force && ncu -u && npm run clean:air
scripts.update:r: cp .backups/package.json.backup package.json && cp .backups/package-lock.json.backup package-lock.json && mv .backups/node_modules.backup node_modules && npm run start:default
